title: PM superpower recovery mission
mission_summary: ProductOS should help PMs turn messy product reality into governed artifacts, alignment outputs, and execution loops while driving repeatable customer and business outcomes.
target_user: Product manager using ProductOS with approved AI agents
customer_problem: PMs spend too much time reconstructing the same truth into artifacts, presentations, reviews, and weekly operating loops.
business_goal: Reduce PM setup friction and make ProductOS credible as the PM operating system for the first impatient customer.
primary_outcomes: Generate one repo-native PM control plane from a single mission.
Reduce PM context reconstruction across discovery, delivery, and review work.
primary_kpis: time from intake to reviewable PRD
time from PRD to aligned docs and deck
success_metrics: time from intake to reviewable PRD
time from PRD to aligned docs and deck
constraints: Keep PM approval explicit for decision-driving scope and release movement.
Preserve observed versus inferred claims when evidence is incomplete.

mission_router.routing_rationale: Run the full PM loop from a mission-first discover start while keeping PM approval explicit at every decision-driving boundary.
stop_conditions: Stop if any phase loses provenance, reviewability, or PM approval visibility.
Stop if downstream phases outrun the accepted mission package.
Stop if release-facing claims exceed the current evidence-backed boundary.

operating_norms: Treat the repository as the system of record.
Keep PM approval explicit for decision-driving scope and release movement.
Preserve observed versus inferred claims when evidence is incomplete.
Prefer the smallest coherent slice that can be reviewed and validated end to end.

stage_goals.discovery: Create a reviewable mission-first discovery packet with explicit evidence posture.
stage_goals.delivery: Turn the accepted concept into a bounded PRD and delivery frame without losing provenance.
stage_goals.launch: Keep launch readiness, communications, and pricing prompts explicit before release movement.

known_risks: The PM control center is still generated from artifacts and should not be claimed as deeper autonomy.
Cross-host parity depends on thin adapter behavior and should stay measurable.
next_action: Run the mission through discover first, keep evidence and approvals explicit, then expand phase coverage only when the prior outputs stay reviewable.
